title: Bean Sprout Watch
description: A sprout diary where kids observe pretend bean growth, stamp what changed, and get nudged toward trying a real bean in a jar.
learningGoals: Practice daily observation language for roots, sprouts, stems, and leaves
Connect plant care to water, light, and gentle handling
interactionModel: observe-journal tap stickers to record what changed or what care the sprout needs
feedbackModel: Every sticker is accepted with pop and sparkle SFX plus a spoken plant observation; the recap replays the growth story.

modes.title: What Does It Need?
modes.skill: match plant cues to care needs

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
